mappings.evidence_note: Document title identifies HKDSE Chemistry Curriculum and Assessment Guide (中四至中六), jointly published by CDC and HKEAA.
Learning objectives split into three strands: 知識和理解, 技能和過程, 價值觀和態度.
Mandatory part lists Topics 1-12 with suggested hours; detailed learning outcomes follow.
Elective part: Topics 13 Industrial Chemistry, 14 Materials Chemistry, 15 Analytical Chemistry; choose any two.
Topic 16 化學的探究研習 is a 20-hour investigative study, not a written-exam topic.
Topic 地球 covers atmosphere, ocean, rocks/minerals; separation techniques and tests.
Topic 微觀世界 I covers atomic structure, periodic table, bonding, structure/properties of metals/ionic/covalent/simple molecular/giant covalent substances.
Topic 金屬 covers occurrence/extraction, reactivity series, reaction stoichiometry, corrosion/protection.
Topic 酸和鹽基 covers acids/bases, indicators/pH, strength, salts/neutralisation, concentration, titration.
Topic 化石燃料和碳化合物 covers fossil fuels/hydrocarbons, homologous series, alkanes/alkenes, addition polymers.
Topic 微觀世界 II covers bond/molecular polarity, intermolecular forces, ice structure, non-octet molecules, molecular shapes.
Topic 氧化還原反應、化學電池和電解 covers cells, redox, electrolysis, electroplating.
Topic 化學反應和能量 covers enthalpy changes, standard enthalpy, Hess's law; bomb calorimetry excluded.
Topic 反應速率 covers rate measurement, factors affecting rate, molar gas volume at r.t.p.
Topic 化學平衡 covers dynamic equilibrium, Kc, effect of concentration/temperature; effect of inert species excluded.
Topic 碳化合物的化學 covers homologous series, isomerism, reactions of functional groups, interconversions, important organic substances.
Topic 化學世界中的規律 covers periodic trends Li-Ar, oxide acid-base properties, transition metals.
Elective Topic 工業化學 covers rate equations, activation energy, catalysis, Haber process, chlor-alkali, methanol synthesis, green chemistry.
Elective Topic 物料化學 covers natural/synthetic polymers, metals/alloys, liquid crystals, nanomaterials, green chemistry.
Elective Topic 分析化學 covers chemical tests, separation/purification, quantitative analysis, instrumental analysis (colorimetry, IR, MS), societal role.
Ten assessment objectives listed under 5.3 評核目標.
Paper 1 mandatory (60%, 2h30m), Paper 2 electives (20%, 1h).
School-based assessment 20%; covers practical and generic skills.
MCQ, short questions, structured questions, essay/extended questions.
Standards-referenced reporting, levels 1-5 with 5** and 5*.
Appendix 2 lists experimental techniques; not a comprehensive mandated list.
